# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User code style preference: comments should use format `//Lorem` (no space after `//`) and avoid XML `summary` comments.
- When editing documentation in `root/documents`, changes should be made in the actual `.docx` file, not only in a separate `.md` file.
- Documentation in `documents/jatek-dokumentacio.md` should be written as plain point-based text (no Markdown-style headings/formatting) and must include deep functional/system-level documentation, not just file lists.
